title: High-Level Symmetric Encryption Algorithm Flow
description: A visual representation of the core steps involved in a symmetric encryption algorithm, such as AES, showing the transformation of plaintext into ciphertext and back using a shared secret key.
relationships: Plaintext and Secret Key are inputs to the Encryption Algorithm
Encryption Algorithm processes inputs to produce Ciphertext
Ciphertext and Secret Key are inputs to the Decryption Algorithm
Decryption Algorithm processes inputs to recover the original Plaintext
